code: import axios from"axios";const BACKEND_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL||"";export const API="".concat(BACKEND_URL,"/api");export const api=axios.create({baseURL:API,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});export async function fetchLaunchInfo(){const{data}=await api.get("/launch-info");return data;}export async function fetchStats(){const{data}=await api.get("/waitlist/stats");return data;}export async function joinWaitlist(payload){const{data}=await api.post("/waitlist",payload);return data;}export async function fetchMarketplaceStats(){const{data}=await api.get("/marketplace/stats");return data;}export async function fetchShops(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const{data}=await api.get("/shops",{params});return data;}export async function fetchProducts(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const{data}=await api.get("/products",{params});return data;}const adminHeaders=adminKey=>({headers:{"X-Admin-Key":adminKey}});export async function createShop(payload,adminKey){const{data}=await api.post("/admin/shops",payload,adminHeaders(adminKey));return data;}export async function updateShop(id,payload,adminKey){const{data}=await api.patch("/admin/shops/".concat(id),payload,adminHeaders(adminKey));return data;}export async function archiveShop(id,adminKey){const{data}=await api.delete("/admin/shops/".concat(id),adminHeaders(adminKey));return data;}export async function createProduct(payload,adminKey){const{data}=await api.post("/admin/products",payload,adminHeaders(adminKey));return data;}export async function updateProduct(id,payload,adminKey){const{data}=await api.patch("/admin/products/".concat(id),payload,adminHeaders(adminKey));return data;}export async function archiveProduct(id,adminKey){const{data}=await api.delete("/admin/products/".concat(id),adminHeaders(adminKey));return data;}
